description: SMK (Statens Museum for Kunst, Copenhagen) golden search cases (14): the per-museum accuracy north-star for the SMK rows in the merged artifact. Authored 2026-07-05 against the 1,481-row on-view set (on_display:true filter). Titles are catalogued in Danish (SMK ships no English titleAlt for almost any on-view row) — queries are Danish or artist-name based; llm-tier cases use English descriptive phrasing to check the interpret-tier stand-in still finds the Danish-titled row. Tiers mirror the Met/AIC/Cleveland/NGA sets.

cases.note: SMK icon; Matisse Portrait of Madame Matisse (The Green Stripe); ø/æ don't diacritic-fold under unicode61 so the query must use the real letters
Skagen-school beach scene; accented artist name
Danish Golden Age; distinctive title token

cases.query: hammershøi strandgade sunlight on the floor
cases.note: mixed Danish proper noun (street name, untranslatable) + English descriptive phrasing for the icon
mixed English + Danish place-name ("the North Sea") anchor

cases.query: krøyer boys bathing on the beach at skagen
cases.note: mixed artist + Danish place name + English scene phrasing

cases.query: matisse's green stripe portrait of his wife
cases.note: English translation of the Danish title phrase, anchored by the artist name
